news.summary: TechTarget, Inc. (Nasdaq: TTGT), a prominent growth accelerator in the B2B Technology sector, disclosed its intention to unveil the financial results for Q1 2025, covering the period till March 31, 2025, subsequent to the market closing on July 1, 2025. The CEO, Gary Nugent, and CFO, Dan Noreck, will conduct a live conference call along with a webcast at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.
news.headline: Informa TechTarget (Nasdaq: TTGT) to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on July 1, 2025 after market close. CEO and CFO to host a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on June 27, 2025, Texas Centers for Infectious Disease Associates (TCIDA) announced a recent data security breach potentially impacting personal and/or protected health information. TCIDA emphasizes its commitment to safeguarding all data.
news.headline: TCIDA in Fort Worth, Texas, reports data security breach affecting personal/health info. Privacy and security are a top priority.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, in Salt Lake City, Security National Financial Corporation (SNFCA) was added to the Russell 3000 Index during the annual reconstitutions of the Russell indexes. This change will come into effect on June 30, 2025, after the US market opens.
news.headline: Security National Financial Corp. (SNFCA) to join Russell 3000 Index. Effective June 30, 2025, after US market opens.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, PyroGenesis Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its shareholder meeting held on June 26, 2025. The company, known for its advanced technologies, including all-electric plasma processes, aids heavy industry in transitioning energy sources. The meeting, conducted virtually, provided key insights into the company's direction. PyroGenesis trades under the tickers TSX: PYR, OTCQX: PYRGF, and FRA: 8PY1. This event marked a pivotal moment for the tech firm as stakeholders voted on crucial matters impacting its sustainable solutions for industries.
news.headline: PyroGenesis reports voting results from its 2025 annual shareholders meeting held virtually on June 26, 2025.

news.summary: A legal investigation is being conducted by Edelson Lechtzin LLP in Newtown, PA regarding data privacy claims related to a breach at EmCentrix. The breach was discovered by EmCentrix around August 14, 2024. Those affected can seek legal counsel by visiting the specified location.
news.headline: Data breach at EmCentrix on Aug 14, 2024, being investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP for customer data compromises.

news.summary: According to Chris Ryan, there are occasions where law enforcement might be violating the law, and the supplier of the equipment is eligible to receive the funds.
news.headline: Some police are damaging Bitcoin ATMs, per Legal Chief of Bitcoin Depot. Provider could be entitled to funds.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, which is the lowest it has been in the last decade. The number of jobs added in the past month alone is a staggering 250,000, surpassing all expectations and setting a positive tone for the economy. Additionally, the stock market has shown significant growth with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching an all-time high of 30,000 points. These figures point towards a strong and resilient economy, suggesting a promising outlook for the future.
news.headline: Saks secures $600M lifeline amid creditor disputes.
Trump claims advantage in trade negotiations with Canada, stating "We hold all the cards".

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.6%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The economy added 431,000 jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations and marking a significant improvement in the labor market. This drop in unemployment is attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending, business investments, and widespread vaccination efforts. The job gains were observed across multiple sectors, with notable increases in the hospitality, retail, and healthcare industries. This positive trend in employment is seen as a sign of recovery and continued growth in the U.S. economy.
news.headline: Airline working to resolve problem causing widespread flight delays in US; thousands of passengers impacted.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. declared its monthly distributions for July, August, and September 2025. The Fund's Board of Directors made this announcement, with the distributions being applicable to shareholders of record as of specific dates in July, August, and September. Shareholders can expect to receive distributions amounting to $0.25 per share in July, $0.28 per share in August, and $0.30 per share in September 2025.
news.headline: Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: RA) declared Q3 2025 monthly distributions for July, August, and September.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, PrimeEnergy Resources Corporation (NASDAQ: PNRG) revealed its selection of Withum Smith+Brown, PC ("Withum") as its new independent registered public accounting firm. This decision marks Withum's commencement of duties on the same day.
news.headline: PrimeEnergy Resources Corp. appoints Withum Smith+Brown, PC as new independent registered public accounting firm on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: Midland, Texas - Mexco Energy Corporation (NYSE American: MXC) recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025, in its Annual Report (Form 10-K) submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The company revealed a notable net income figure of $1,712,368, equal to $0.81 per diluted share. This marks a significant 27% surge in comparison to the previous fiscal year's results in 2024.
news.headline: Mexco Energy Corp. reports $1.7M net income for FY2025, $0.81 per share, up 27% from FY2024.

news.summary: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in over a year. This decrease comes after the economy added 531,000 jobs in October, surpassing economists' expectations. The job gains were mostly seen in the leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, manufacturing, and transportation and warehousing sectors. This positive trend in employment is a promising sign for the overall economic recovery from the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: Boeing gets Buy rating as Redburn predicts stronger future. #stockmarket

news.summary: Today on June 27, 2025, in Toronto, Trisura Group Ltd. (TSX: TSU) revealed the outcomes of its virtual annual and special shareholder meeting. The meeting was conducted on the same day.
news.headline: Trisura Group announces results of annual and special meeting in Toronto on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: This week, several stocks across consumer, technology, and financial sectors are gaining attention. Companies like MercadoLibre, SAP, and Uber are among those approaching buy points, according to Investor's Business Daily. These stocks are poised for potential growth and investment as their shares show promising trends.
news.headline: Stocks in focus this week include MercadoLibre, SAP, and Uber as shares near buy points in consumer, tech, and financial sectors.

news.summary: In Detroit, Altimetrik, a company specializing in AI, Data, and Digital engineering solutions, has confirmed the acquisition of SLK Software, a global technology services firm known for AI, intelligence automation, and analytics solutions. This strategic agreement aims to enhance Altimetrik's range of services and broaden its client base, facilitating progress towards their target of reaching $1 billion in annual revenue.
news.headline: Altimetrik acquires SLK Software to enhance AI services, aiming to reach $1 billion in annual revenue.

news.summary: There has been a remarkable 20.5% compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) in global industrial sectors due to the acceleration of digital transformation, integration of XR technology, and adoption of immersive collaborative environments. This growth trend is evident worldwide, particularly pronounced in the industrial metaverse market. The market in REDDING, Calif. witnessed significant developments as of June 27, 2025.
news.headline: Industrial metaverse market to grow from USD 48.2B to USD 600.6B by 2032, driven by 20.5% CAGR growth, digital transformation, XR tech, and immersive environments.

news.summary: Zohran Mamdani emerged victorious over Andrew Cuomo in the Democratic primary for New York City’s mayoral race. Despite this triumph, Mamdani faces tough competition in a landscape where concerns around digital assets may arise.
news.headline: Zohran Mamdani wins Democratic primary against Andrew Cuomo in NYC mayoral race. Crypto could be key issue.

news.summary: Today in Eden, North Carolina, State Senator Phil Berger and leaders from various credit unions gathered at Piedmont Advantage Credit Union to celebrate the importance of community and connections. The event took place on June 27, 2025, and attendees were filled with joy, gratitude, and a sense of familiarity. Members of the credit union came together to reconnect with each other, showcasing the strong bonds within the community. It was a heartwarming event that highlighted the significance of relationships and collaboration, emphasizing the value of community support and unity.
news.headline: Piedmont Advantage Credit Union in Eden, N.C. hosts Member Appreciation Day with Senator Phil Berger, celebrating community.

news.summary: In London on June 27, 2025, it was announced that the Soremi Mine in the Boko Yanga metal corridor within the Republic of the Congo is managed by Société de Recherche et d'Exploitation Minière ('Soremi SA'). This local ROC company is responsible for the production of copper cathodes and zinc ingots in the region.
news.headline: Gerald Group cautions against unauthorized tenders by Soremi SA in Congo for copper cathode and zinc ingot.

news.summary: Embrace the essence of rhythm, roots, and renewal at the Mindful Market, organized by Bloom Together LLC, a hub for Bloom Yoga, Bloom 2 Table, and Bloom Together Entertainment. Taking place on Saturday, July 26th, starting from noon until 6 PM, this annual gathering transcends a mere marketplace, evolving into a sacred space.
news.headline: "Bloom Together hosts Mindful Market on July 26th, 12-6PM, featuring yoga, food, and entertainment. A sacred space for all."

news.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase, reaching new heights. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq also achieved record highs on the same day. Despite Trump's decision to end trade talks with Canada, the stock market rallied into the close. The S&P and Nasdaq specifically were at their peak levels.
news.headline: Stock market rallies at close with Dow up, S&P and Nasdaq hitting record highs; Trump ends Canada trade talks.

news.summary: During the past week, the stock market reached all-time high levels, with the Dow Jones Futures experiencing significant gains. Investors are eagerly awaiting Tesla's delivery numbers, which are expected to be released soon. This surge in the stock market reflects positive investor sentiment and could indicate further growth. Keep a close eye on Tesla's upcoming deliveries as they may impact market trends.
news.headline: Stock market at record highs, Dow Jones Futures on the rise. Tesla deliveries expected. Investors advised to plan ahead.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, based in San Francisco, California, Gold Bar Whiskey, a prestigious whiskey brand, revealed the introduction of two exclusive products. The limited-edition items mark a tribute to both cryptocurrency and craftsmanship, showcasing the innovative direction the brand is taking.
news.headline: Gold Bar Whiskey introduces limited-edition crypto-inspired releases: The Bitcoin Reserve & The Satoshi Reserve in San Francisco.

news.summary: Ripple has decided to withdraw its appeal in the lengthy SEC case concerning XRP sales, bringing an end to the legal dispute.
news.headline: Ripple to end appeal in SEC case regarding XRP sales, to bring closure to the case.
TESLA AUTOPILOT SUIT OVER FATAL FLORIDA CRASH GOES TO TRIAL
Trump says he won't appoint someone who wants to keep interest rates steady, indicating a preference for rate changes.

news.summary: Solana has surpassed Ethereum in DEX market share, reaching a significant milestone with a notable increase in market dominance. The shift in market dynamics has sparked curiosity about whether the price of SOL will reflect this achievement in the near future. Investors are eager to see if the growth in market share will translate to a corresponding surge in SOL price, as Solana continues to make waves in the cryptocurrency space. Stay tuned for updates on how this development may impact the value of SOL in the coming days.
news.headline: Solana moves to 2nd in DEX volumes, surpassing Ethereum. Will SOL price surge in response to the increase?
Lawler confirms salt deal is 40,000 for five years

news.summary: Toronto-based Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (Granite) is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on August 6, 2025, post-market close. The company trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under symbol GRT.UN and on the New York Stock Exchange under symbol GRP.U. Following the release, a conference call and live webcast will be held on August 7, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET), led by President and CEO Kevan Gorrie. This event aims to discuss the financial outcomes with investors and analysts.
news.headline: Granite REIT to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 6, followed by conference call on Aug 7 at 11am ET.

news.summary: In New York, SL Green, Caesars Entertainment, Roc Nation, and Live Nation have jointly submitted a proposal for Caesars Palace Times Square (CPTS) in Times Square. The plan involves converting an office building at 1515 Broadway into a luxurious five-star hotel with 992 rooms. The hotel will house restaurants offering a mix of local and international cuisine. This project aims to establish a top-notch gaming, entertainment, and accommodation venue in the bustling Times Square district.
news.headline: SL Green, Caesars Entertainment, Roc Nation, and Live Nation propose Caesars Palace Times Square, a 992-room hotel in 1515 Broadway.

news.summary: Silver Storm Mining Ltd. has decided to boost the size of its non-brokered private placement from C$2,600,000 to now reach C$4,004,000 due to strong investor interest. This move comes in response to heightened demand for the Company's offering. The increased Offering involves selling a maximum of 30,800,000 units at a price of $0.13 per unit. This decision reflects the positive reception and support from investors, leading to an expansion in potential gross proceeds.
news.headline: Silver Storm Mining Ltd. increases non-brokered private placement size to $4M from $2.6M, selling up to 30.8M units at $0.13.

news.summary: MDA Space Ltd., listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol MDA, has confirmed the continued availability of essential satellite and space systems integration and testing capabilities in Canada. The company, based in Brampton, Ontario, serves as a reliable mission partner to the fast-growing global space sector. This announcement was made on June 27, 2025.
news.headline: MDA Space Ltd. reopens operations at David Florida Laboratory in Canada to support satellite and space systems integration.

news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index showed slight gains as it geared up for further testimony by Powell. FedEx experienced a significant drop following its earnings report. Today's stock market performance reflects a mixed trend in indexes, with President Trump contemplating the next Federal Reserve chief. In addition, Nvidia reached a record high, adding to the market's dynamic movements.
news.headline: Stock market mixed as Dow Jones rises, Nvidia hits all-time high; FedEx plunges on earnings, Trump considers Fed chief.

news.summary: With an impressive tenure of 30 years in financial and accounting leadership roles, Mr. LeBlanc joins Lightspeed Commerce Inc. to drive forward the company's three-year strategy and transformation journey. This development was announced in Montreal on June 27, 2025. Lightspeed Commerce Inc. is listed on both the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: LSPD) and the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: LSPD).
news.headline: Glen LeBlanc - with 30 years of financial expertise - joins Lightspeed Commerce Board of Directors.

news.summary: Issuers like Berkeley Square, Franklin Templeton, and BlackRock are key players in Aptos' tokenized economy, driving its growth and development.
news.headline: Aptos witnesses rise in tokenized assets, with asset managers like Berkeley Square, Franklin Templeton, and BlackRock joining the onchain trend.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Boqii Holding Limited (NYSE American: BQ) disclosed its decision to end the Deposit Agreement from September 29, 2020. This agreement involved the Company, The Bank of New York Mellon as the Depositary, and other stakeholders.
news.headline: Boqii (NYSE: BQ) will end ADR program, consolidate shares for AMEX trade.

news.summary: Swiss-based company Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV) is scheduled to disclose its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2025 on July 31, 2025. An investor call is set to take place on the same day at 8:00 a.m. ET. The call, to be led by Aptiv's Chair and CEO, Kevin Clark, and Executive VP and CFO, Varun Laroyia, will provide insights into the results. Access to the live webcast and accompanying presentation materials can be found on the Aptiv Investor Relations website at ir.aptiv.com. Additionally, a recording of the call will be available post-event for review.
news.headline: Aptiv (NYSE: APTV) releasing Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025 with an investor call at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Nine Energy Service has disclosed the schedule for the release of their second quarter 2025 earnings report and accompanying conference call. The earnings release and call are set to occur on a specific date.
news.headline: Nine Energy Service to release Second Quarter 2025 earnings report. Company to hold conference call.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 27, 2025, Canada Energy Partners Inc. (NEX: CE.H) has reported the termination of its non-brokered private placement. The private placement, initially announced on April 11, 2025, and subsequently extended until June 26, 2025, has now been terminated by the company.
news.headline: Canada Energy Partners terminates non-brokered private placement extended until June 26, 2025, announced on April 11, 2025.

news.summary: On Friday, an unexpected systems outage led to the temporary grounding of several planes in the United States. This incident affected numerous crew members and passengers, causing significant disruptions. The outage impacted a substantial number of flights across the country, leading to delays and frustration for those involved.
news.headline: Computer glitch delays American Airlines flights, grounding some planes. Crew and passengers affected nationwide.

news.summary: Nasdaq is driving technological advancements to bolster trading expansion. The company is proactively investing in developing cutting-edge technologies to enhance trading capabilities and support growth. The initiative aims to leverage the latest tools and innovations to propel trading activities forward. Nasdaq's commitment to incorporating advanced technologies is expected to foster a more robust trading environment and drive trading volume upwards.
news.headline: Nasdaq reports record notional value of shares traded during 2025 Russell US Indexes reconstitution, boosting technological development.
New townhome community, Medley Park, introduced by LGI Homes in Clayton, NC, near Raleigh.

news.summary: According to the latest report, the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 200 million, with approximately 4.2 million deaths reported. The United States has recorded the highest number of cases, with over 35 million infections and 612,000 deaths. India follows with about 31 million cases and 414,000 deaths. The surge in cases has led to overwhelmed healthcare systems in several countries, prompting governments to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The vaccination rollout continues worldwide, with over 4 billion doses administered so far. Despite efforts to vaccinate the population, concerns remain about vaccine accessibility and hesitancy in certain regions. Several countries are facing challenges in achieving widespread vaccination coverage, exacerbating the threat of new variants emerging. As the global death toll continues to rise, health officials emphasize the importance of vaccination and adherence to public health guidelines to mitigate the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: June sees Wall Street thriving, contrary to economic pessimism.: June sees Wall Street thriving, despite economic pessimism.
